epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: Let me show T and come back to u
I don’t think they do - humans get other tics which can be quite nasty!
In usual car park but no hurry xx
Arthur didn’t take a white shirt, so 🤷‍♀️ I can’t get worked up about things like this! 🤣

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline

lead.headline: A human redesign is reshaping your video and deck.
lead.deck: This foundational shift affects multiple deliverables at once, so alignment on the new direction needs to happen now before work fragments across channels. Getting this locked in early prevents costly rework downstream.
